Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions Against The Plaintiff And/ Or His Attorney Of Record
Off Calendar Dec-12-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant City and County of San Francisco's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories (set #1, #2) and request for production of documents (set #1) is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses within 15 days of notice of this order. The Court finds that failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $320 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
